rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into component implementations when binding implementation-level details, and into component types for structural contracts.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component boundaries when embedding AGREE annexes; do not cross type-implementation scope boundaries in contract declarations.
Use only visible ports and properties in contracts—never implementation-private subcomponent paths.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar types must be declared as int, real, or bool—not integer or boolean.
Annex blocks must use the exact syntax: annex agree {** ... **};
anti_patterns: Avoid embedding implementation-specific paths in component type annexes—this breaks abstraction and traceability.
